docstrings.Command: A Scrapy command to fetch a URL using the Scrapy downloader.
docstrings.Command.add_options: Add command-specific options to the argparse parser.
docstrings.Command.long_desc: Fetch a URL using the Scrapy downloader and print its content to stdout. You may want to use --nolog to disable logging
docstrings.Command.run: Execute the command using the provided args and opts.
docstrings.Command.run.start: An asynchronous generator that yields the request for the spider.
docstrings.Command.short_desc: Fetch a URL using the Scrapy downloader
docstrings.Command.syntax: The command line syntax for this command.
